allow: Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT name_zh, substr\(description_zh,1,80\), body_systems IS NOT NULL as has_systems, symptoms IS NOT NULL as has_symptoms, drugs IS NOT NULL as has_drugs, breeds IS NOT NULL as has_breeds, detail_json IS NOT NULL as has_detail FROM kb_diseases WHERE slug='acetaminophen-toxicity';")

Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT name_zh, substr\(description_zh,1,80\), substr\(indications,1,80\), dosing_json IS NOT NULL as has_dosing, detail_json IS NOT NULL as has_detail FROM kb_drugs2 WHERE slug='acarbose';")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM kb_breed_diseases;")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT species, breed, disease, risk_level FROM kb_breed_diseases LIMIT 5;")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('F:/Users/宋泽锋/Desktop/Pet/peqaboo/peqaboo_data/diseases_detail.json','utf8'\)\); const withBreeds=d.filter\(x=>\(x.breedPredispositions||[]\).length>0\); console.log\('有品种倾向的疾病:',withBreeds.length\); withBreeds.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(x=>{console.log\(x.canonicalName\); x.breedPredispositions.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(b=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\({slug:b.slug,cn:b.canonical_name,i18n:b.name_i18n?Object.keys\(b.name_i18n\).filter\(k=>k.includes\('zh'\)\):null,risk:b.risk_level,evidence:b.evidence_strength}\)\)\);}\)")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT id, species, breed, disease, risk_level FROM kb_breed_diseases ORDER BY rowid DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT id, name, species, breed, gender, birth_date FROM pets;")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "SELECT slug, canonical_name, species, weight_min, weight_max FROM kb_breeds2 WHERE species='cat' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "ALTER TABLE health_scores ADD COLUMN weight_score REAL;")
Bash(sqlite3 "F:/Pet_Projects/VetLens/data/vetlens.db" "ALTER TABLE health_scores ADD COLUMN age_score REAL;")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/health-scores -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"petId":"c0ed28cf-d6cf-461a-b9e0-7231fd07159e","testDate":"2026-07-10","species":"猫","bun":8.5,"crea":140,"glu":5.5,"amy":950,"wbc":11,"rbc":7.5,"hct":34,"notes":"验证体重年龄评分"}')

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('综合:',j.overallScore,'分','等级:',j.grade\);j.categories.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.name,'权重'+c.weight+'%:',c.totalScore,'分'\)\);if\(j.warnings?.length\)console.log\('⚠️:',j.warnings.join\(';'\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('RAW ERR:',d.slice\(0,300\)\)}}\)")
Bash(awk 'NR>=75 && NR<=95' "f:/Users/宋泽锋/Desktop/Pet/应用端模拟/vetlens-app/src/routes/api/health-scores/+server.ts")
